name: Do I need a lawyer for answer engine optimization disputes in LA?

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for answer engine optimization disputes in LA?

acceptedAnswer.text: No for setup, yes for lawsuits.[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **No for basic GEO implementation, but yes for liability claims against AI providers or competitors.**[1] Self-optimize via guides.[3] **Key factors:** 1. DIY suits small tweaks. 2. Litigation needs AI law expert. 3. CA bias rules apply.[1] **Start free: build FAQs; hire if sued over false AI claims.**[4] Lawyers optional initially.[3]
